title: RowCount Property
description:
Used to set or get the number of rows in a Grid control.

If set to a value greater than the current number of lines, a new line will be added to the end. If set to a value less than the current number of lines, a new line will be removed from the end.
examples:
Integer count
GSet frmMain.Grid1.RowCount, 50
GGet frmMain.Grid1.RowCount, count
